Document:
# Vampire: Dantalion
[color=#68993f][italic]"Power is in blood. Authority is in other people's decisions."[/italic][/color]
Dantalion is the social control class. You don't need to be the strongest fighter — you make sure nobody gets to fight back. Your resources are [bold]thralls[/bold] and [bold]attention control[/bold].
## Abilities (Total Blood Threshold | Cost)
[bold](150 | 150)[/bold] Enthrall: Long channel (about 15 seconds) on a humanoid. You use a large portion of your power to sway those loyal to none to be loyal to you only
[bold](250 | 30)[/bold] Pacify: Pacify a target temporarily, making them unable to cause harm.
[bold](250 | 30)[/bold] Subspace Swap: Switch positions with a target.
[bold](400 | 30)[/bold] Decoy: Leave behind a fragile duplicate that punishes attackers while you slip into invisibility. Use it to drop focus in corridors.
[bold](600 | 100)[/bold] Rally Thralls: Removes all incapacitating effects from your nearby thralls.
[bold](800 | Toggle)[/bold] Blood Bond: Tethers you to nearby thralls and redistributes damage.
[bold](1000 | 70)[/bold] Mass Hysteria: Casts a powerful illusion to make everyone nearby perceive others to looks like random animals after briefly blinding them.
